Interface DRIBasePlot

All Superinterfaces:
DRIPlot, Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
DRIAxisPlot, DRIBarPlot, DRIBubblePlot, DRICandlestickPlot, DRIDifferencePlot, DRIGroupedStackedBarPlot, DRIHighLowPlot, DRILayeredBarPlot, DRILinePlot, DRIMultiAxisPlot, DRIPiePlot, DRIWaterfallBarPlot, DRIXyBlockPlot, DRIXyStepPlot
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractBasePlot, DRAxisPlot, DRBarPlot, DRBubblePlot, DRCandlestickPlot, DRDifferencePlot, DRGroupedStackedBarPlot, DRHighLowPlot, DRLayeredBarPlot, DRLinePlot, DRMultiAxisPlot, DRPiePlot, DRWaterfallBarPlot, DRXyBlockPlot, DRXyStepPlot
public interface DRIBasePlot extends DRIPlot

DRIBasePlot interface.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
